name: Mr. Squarely
author: Poki
description: Mr. Squarely is a platform game where you help the bouncy hero jump his way to the destination! Control Mr. Squarely’s powerful jumps, dodge tricky obstacles, and grab magic potions that let him grow bigger or shrink smaller to solve clever platforming challenges. Timing and control are everything on this square adventure. Ready to jump, dodge, and potion your way to victory? How to play Mr. Squarely? Use A/D or the left and right arrow keys to play! Who created Mr. Squarely? Mr. Squarely is created by Lake Horse. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Mr. Squarely for free? You can play Mr. Squarely for free on Poki. Can I play Mr. Squarely on mobile devices and desktop? Mr. Squarely can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
